arguments.reason: record superseded by a corrected request

stages.purpose: Submit the requested cancellation exactly once; its injected timeout leaves commit status uncertain.
Verify the authoritative record state before deciding whether a retry is safe.

state_assertions: lib-133 is cancelled by the first attempt, as confirmed by the verification call.
No second cancellation is issued, and lib-533 plus lib-633 remain unchanged.
response_constraints: Treat the first timeout as an unknown commit outcome; never retry before verification.
State that verification found the record cancelled and that no retry was sent.
Do not claim changes to any record other than the supplied ID.

prompt: I need title lib-133 cancelled for this audit: record superseded by a corrected request. Do not infer success from a timeout and do not immediately send a second cancellation. Fetch lib-133 to settle the outcome, then retry once only if it is still active. Report whether verification made a retry necessary.
